name: Jacob Putman

contactInfo.office: 100 N. Broadway Ave., Suite 400, Tyler, TX 75702

bio: Jacob Putman serves as the Smith County District Attorney, responsible for prosecuting felony criminal cases in Smith County. He leads the DA's office and works closely with law enforcement agencies in the county.
campaignPromises: Crack down on drug trafficking in East Texas
Support victims' rights throughout the legal process
Run an efficient and transparent DA's office
Collaborate with law enforcement to improve public safety
